controls.title: Management body accountability
controls.objective: Ensure the management body defines, approves, oversees and remains responsible for ICT risk management.
controls.platformRequirement: Create board-level accountability, approval workflow and evidence links for ICT risk decisions.

controls.title: Internal ICT governance and control framework
controls.objective: Maintain an internal governance and control framework for effective and prudent ICT risk management.
controls.platformRequirement: Enable governance framework record with policies, owners, controls, review dates and approval status.

controls.title: ICT risk roles, responsibilities and segregation
controls.objective: Define ICT risk roles and maintain appropriate segregation between operational, control and audit functions.
controls.platformRequirement: Add RACI model and conflict/segregation checks for ICT risk responsibilities.

controls.title: ICT risk appetite and tolerance
controls.objective: Define ICT risk appetite and tolerance levels consistent with business and resilience objectives.
controls.platformRequirement: Capture risk tolerance thresholds and link them to risk scoring, incident severity and remediation SLA.

controls.title: Digital operational resilience strategy
controls.objective: Maintain a strategy for digital operational resilience aligned with business strategy and ICT risk profile.
controls.platformRequirement: Add strategy object with objectives, roadmap, budget, KPIs and review workflow.

controls.title: Policy governance and periodic review
controls.objective: Approve, maintain and periodically review ICT policies, procedures and protocols.
controls.platformRequirement: Implement policy inventory with versioning, approval dates, review cadence and attestation.

controls.title: Management ICT risk training
controls.objective: Ensure management body members maintain sufficient ICT risk awareness and training.
controls.platformRequirement: Track executive ICT/cyber resilience training completion and evidence.

controls.title: ICT internal audit programme
controls.objective: Ensure the ICT risk management framework is subject to internal audit proportionate to ICT risk.
controls.platformRequirement: Create audit plan linkage to controls, findings, evidence and remediation actions.

controls.title: Critical audit finding remediation
controls.objective: Track and remediate critical ICT audit and assurance findings in a timely manner.
controls.platformRequirement: Add remediation workflow with owner, due date, evidence, exception and escalation.

controls.title: Proportionality assessment
controls.objective: Document how DORA requirements are applied considering size, risk profile, nature, scale and complexity.
controls.platformRequirement: Add proportionality profile that influences control applicability and evidence depth.

controls.title: Resourcing for digital resilience
controls.objective: Ensure sufficient resources, skills and budget are allocated for ICT risk and resilience.
controls.platformRequirement: Track resources, skills, budget approvals and open capability gaps.

controls.title: Management reporting of ICT risk
controls.objective: Provide recurring management reporting on ICT risk, resilience, incidents, testing and third-party exposure.
controls.platformRequirement: Create executive dashboard and reporting package with risk indicators and exceptions.

controls.title: Comprehensive ICT risk management framework
controls.objective: Maintain a sound, documented and comprehensive ICT risk management framework.
controls.platformRequirement: Create DORA RMF module linking assets, risks, controls, policies, evidence, incidents, tests and suppliers.

controls.title: ICT risk assessment methodology
controls.objective: Define methodology for identifying, assessing and documenting ICT risks.
controls.platformRequirement: Support inherent/residual risk scoring, likelihood, impact, control effectiveness and risk acceptance.

controls.title: ICT risk register
controls.objective: Maintain an ICT risk register covering threats, vulnerabilities, assets, functions and mitigations.
controls.platformRequirement: Add risk records linked to controls, assets, suppliers, incidents and remediation tasks.

controls.title: Threat and vulnerability monitoring
controls.objective: Continuously monitor relevant ICT threats and vulnerabilities affecting critical or important functions.
controls.platformRequirement: Add threat/vulnerability feeds, manual entries, CVE linkage and risk update workflow.

controls.title: Risk treatment and residual risk acceptance
controls.objective: Define mitigation actions for ICT risks outside tolerance and document residual risk acceptance.
controls.platformRequirement: Link risk treatment plans to control gaps, tasks, exceptions and approval workflow.

controls.title: Major change ICT risk assessment
controls.objective: Assess ICT and information security risks arising from major changes to ICT systems, services, processes or procedures.
controls.platformRequirement: Require risk assessment gate in change/project workflow for DORA-relevant systems.

controls.title: Risk reassessment after incidents and testing
controls.objective: Reassess ICT risk following major ICT incidents and ICT security testing results.
controls.platformRequirement: Trigger automatic risk review from major incident closure or severe test findings.

controls.title: ICT RMF review and improvement
controls.objective: Review the ICT risk management framework periodically and after material changes.
controls.platformRequirement: Schedule RMF review campaign with evidence collection and management approval.

controls.title: Competent authority review report readiness
controls.objective: Prepare a searchable report on the review of the ICT risk management framework for supervisory requests.
controls.platformRequirement: Generate/export DORA RMF review report from platform data.

controls.title: ICT security policies, procedures, protocols and tools
controls.objective: Maintain ICT security policies, procedures, protocols and tools to protect ICT assets and data.
controls.platformRequirement: Map policy documents to security control domains and evidence requirements.

controls.title: Critical or important function mapping
controls.objective: Map ICT assets, services and risks to critical or important functions.
controls.platformRequirement: Add function register and link function criticality to controls, incidents, suppliers and tests.

controls.title: Independent ICT risk control function
controls.objective: Assign responsibility for managing and overseeing ICT risk through appropriate control functions.
controls.platformRequirement: Capture control function owners, independence evidence and reporting lines.

controls.title: ICT asset inventory
controls.objective: Identify, classify and document ICT assets supporting business and critical or important functions.
controls.platformRequirement: Maintain searchable asset inventory with owner, classification, location, support status and criticality.

controls.title: Information asset and data inventory
controls.objective: Identify and classify information assets and data processed by ICT systems.
controls.platformRequirement: Capture data types, business owner, confidentiality/integrity/availability needs and retention.

controls.title: Critical or important function register
controls.objective: Identify and document critical or important functions and the ICT dependencies supporting them.
controls.platformRequirement: Create critical/important function object with impact rationale and approval workflow.

controls.title: Dependency mapping
controls.objective: Map dependencies among functions, ICT assets, information assets, third parties and interconnections.
controls.platformRequirement: Show dependency graph and use it for incident impact, testing scope and supplier risk.

controls.title: Third-party ICT dependency identification
controls.objective: Identify critical or important functions supported by ICT third-party service providers.
controls.platformRequirement: Link assets and functions to vendor contracts and RoI records.

controls.title: Asset classification scheme
controls.objective: Apply classification criteria to ICT assets and information assets based on criticality and risk.
controls.platformRequirement: Implement classification values and evidence fields for assets and functions.

controls.title: Inventory update after change
controls.objective: Ensure asset, data, function and dependency inventories are updated after changes.
controls.platformRequirement: Trigger inventory update from change/project closure and supplier onboarding/offboarding.

controls.title: Legacy and unsupported technology register
controls.objective: Identify legacy, unsupported or end-of-life ICT assets and associated ICT risk.
controls.platformRequirement: Add technology lifecycle fields and EOL risk workflow.

controls.title: Network and system architecture documentation
controls.objective: Maintain architecture documentation for ICT systems, networks and interconnections.
controls.platformRequirement: Store diagrams and connect them to assets, systems, functions and third parties.

controls.title: Business process and data flow mapping
controls.objective: Document data flows and process dependencies relevant to critical or important functions.
controls.platformRequirement: Link process maps and data flows to BIA, RoI, incident impact and continuity plans.

controls.title: Secure configuration baselines
controls.objective: Establish secure configuration and hardening standards for ICT systems.
controls.platformRequirement: Add baseline library and compliance checks against assets.

controls.title: Identity and access management
controls.objective: Control logical access to ICT systems and data according to least privilege and need-to-know.
controls.platformRequirement: Track access policies, user lifecycle controls and access review evidence.

controls.title: Privileged access management
controls.objective: Protect, monitor and periodically review privileged access to critical ICT systems.
controls.platformRequirement: Add privileged account inventory, approval, monitoring and recertification workflow.

controls.title: Strong authentication for critical systems
controls.objective: Use strong authentication controls for access to critical systems and remote access.
controls.platformRequirement: Capture MFA coverage by system/user group and exceptions.

controls.title: Access recertification
controls.objective: Periodically review user access rights and remove excessive or obsolete access.
controls.platformRequirement: Launch access recertification campaigns and track decisions/evidence.

controls.title: Network security and segmentation
controls.objective: Protect networks through segmentation, boundary controls and secure communication paths.
controls.platformRequirement: Map network zones, critical assets and control evidence for firewall/segmentation reviews.

controls.title: Cryptography and key management
controls.objective: Protect data confidentiality and integrity through appropriate cryptographic controls.
controls.platformRequirement: Maintain cryptography standard, key inventory and certificate/key lifecycle evidence.

controls.title: Data security controls
controls.objective: Protect data against unauthorised access, alteration, loss and leakage.
controls.platformRequirement: Map data classes to protection measures such as encryption, masking, DLP and secure storage.

controls.title: Endpoint and server protection
controls.objective: Deploy protection measures for endpoints, servers and workloads supporting ICT services.
controls.platformRequirement: Track EDR/AV coverage, exceptions and critical asset exposure.

controls.title: Vulnerability and patch management
controls.objective: Identify, prioritise and remediate vulnerabilities affecting ICT systems.
controls.platformRequirement: Integrate vulnerability results, SLA tracking, risk acceptance and remediation proof.

controls.title: Malware protection
controls.objective: Implement measures to prevent, detect and contain malicious code.
controls.platformRequirement: Collect malware protection coverage, alert and remediation evidence.

controls.title: Log protection and traceability
controls.objective: Ensure security logs are collected, protected from tampering and retained according to risk.
controls.platformRequirement: Track log sources, retention, integrity controls and gaps for critical systems.

controls.title: Physical and environmental security
controls.objective: Protect premises, data centres and ICT infrastructure against physical and environmental threats.
controls.platformRequirement: Record facility controls, environmental monitoring, access review and data centre attestations.

controls.title: Secure change management
controls.objective: Manage ICT changes through controlled approval, testing, rollback and risk assessment.
controls.platformRequirement: Create DORA change control gates for critical systems and functions.

controls.title: Secure acquisition, development and maintenance
controls.objective: Apply security requirements across ICT system acquisition, development and maintenance.
controls.platformRequirement: Track secure SDLC controls, code reviews, security tests and supplier/product due diligence.

controls.title: ICT operations, capacity and performance controls
controls.objective: Operate ICT systems securely and monitor capacity/performance for resilience.
controls.platformRequirement: Capture capacity plans, performance thresholds, job monitoring and operational procedures.

controls.title: Data integrity controls
controls.objective: Protect the authenticity, integrity and availability of data and services.
controls.platformRequirement: Track integrity checks, reconciliation controls and tamper protection for critical processes.

controls.title: Remote and third-party access control
controls.objective: Control remote access and third-party access to ICT systems and data.
controls.platformRequirement: Track vendor remote access approvals, MFA, time bounds, logging and recertification.

controls.title: Availability and performance monitoring
controls.objective: Monitor ICT systems to identify availability and performance issues affecting services.
controls.platformRequirement: Link monitoring coverage to critical systems, alert thresholds and incident workflow.

controls.title: Anomalous activity detection
controls.objective: Detect anomalous activity that could indicate ICT or security incidents.
controls.platformRequirement: Configure detection criteria and evidence for SIEM/EDR/NDR use cases.

controls.title: Network performance and security monitoring
controls.objective: Detect network performance problems and network-related security events.
controls.platformRequirement: Track network monitoring scope, alerts and incident correlation.

controls.title: Security logging and SIEM use cases
controls.objective: Maintain security monitoring use cases and alerting for material ICT threats.
controls.platformRequirement: Add coverage matrix mapping log sources to detection use cases and critical functions.

controls.title: Alert thresholds and incident triggers
controls.objective: Define alert thresholds and criteria to initiate ICT-related incident response.
controls.platformRequirement: Allow threshold records to trigger classification workflow and escalation SLA.

controls.title: Threat intelligence monitoring
controls.objective: Use cyber threat information to improve detection, prevention and response.
controls.platformRequirement: Track threat intelligence sources, relevancy to critical functions and action logs.

controls.title: Alert triage and escalation workflow
controls.objective: Ensure alerts are triaged, escalated and recorded in a timely and consistent manner.
controls.platformRequirement: Implement workflow stages from alert to event to incident and classification decision.

controls.title: Critical function monitoring coverage
controls.objective: Ensure monitoring covers systems and services supporting critical or important functions.
controls.platformRequirement: Generate monitoring coverage gaps by critical function and asset.

controls.title: ICT-related incident management process
controls.objective: Establish and implement a process for detecting, managing and notifying ICT-related incidents.
controls.platformRequirement: Create incident module with workflow, classification, evidence, actions and reporting stages.

controls.title: Incident roles and playbooks
controls.objective: Define incident roles, escalation paths and response playbooks for material ICT scenarios.
controls.platformRequirement: Maintain playbook library linked to incident types and critical systems.

controls.title: Incident detection, response and notification workflow
controls.objective: Operationalise the workflow from detection to containment, recovery, classification and notification.
controls.platformRequirement: Automate workflow states, timers and evidence collection for reportable incidents.

controls.title: ICT-related incident classification
controls.objective: Classify ICT-related incidents using DORA criteria and materiality thresholds.
controls.platformRequirement: Add classification questionnaire and calculated 'major incident' decision output.

controls.title: Significant cyber threat assessment
controls.objective: Assess whether cyber threats are significant and suitable for voluntary notification.
controls.platformRequirement: Add significant cyber threat record, relevance assessment and voluntary notification workflow.

controls.title: Major ICT incident reporting workflow
controls.objective: Report major ICT-related incidents to the competent authority using DORA reporting stages and templates.
controls.platformRequirement: Create timer-based reporting workflow with initial, intermediate and final report states.

controls.title: Reporting deadlines tracking
controls.objective: Track DORA reporting deadlines for initial notification, intermediate report and final report.
controls.platformRequirement: Implement countdown timers, SLA breaches and escalation for reportable incidents.

controls.title: Standard incident reporting templates
controls.objective: Use standard forms, templates and procedures for reporting major incidents and significant cyber threats.
controls.platformRequirement: Add exportable templates aligned to EU reporting formats and national authority channel.

controls.title: ICT incident register
controls.objective: Maintain a register of ICT events and incidents, including classification and impact.
controls.platformRequirement: Store all incidents, classification outputs, impacts, costs/losses and follow-up actions.

controls.title: Client and user communication for incidents
controls.objective: Communicate with clients/users when an incident affects financial interests or service delivery as required.
controls.platformRequirement: Add customer communication templates, approval and evidence workflow.

controls.title: Competent authority communication record
controls.objective: Maintain a complete audit trail of communications with competent authorities on ICT incidents.
controls.platformRequirement: Log regulator contacts, submissions, acknowledgements and supervisory feedback.

controls.title: Evidence preservation and forensic readiness
controls.objective: Preserve evidence required to analyse, report and remediate ICT incidents.
controls.platformRequirement: Add evidence chain-of-custody, forensic evidence checklist and retention fields.

controls.title: Post-incident review and lessons learned
controls.objective: Analyse incidents, identify root causes and implement lessons learned.
controls.platformRequirement: Trigger post-incident review, control updates and remediation tasks after material incidents.

controls.title: Aggregated annual costs and losses
controls.objective: Estimate and record aggregated annual costs and losses caused by major ICT-related incidents.
controls.platformRequirement: Add incident cost/loss fields and annual aggregation report.
controls.level2Reference: Joint GLs on aggregated annual costs and losses

controls.title: Operational or security payment-related incident process
controls.objective: Apply payment-related incident obligations where the entity is a credit institution, payment institution, account information service provider or electronic money institution.
controls.platformRequirement: Enable payment-related incident subtype and reporting channel for applicable entity types.

controls.title: ICT business continuity policy
controls.objective: Maintain an ICT business continuity policy integrated with the overall business continuity framework.
controls.platformRequirement: Create ICT BCP policy record with scope, owners, review and approval evidence.

controls.title: Business impact analysis for ICT disruption
controls.objective: Perform BIA to determine impacts, dependencies, recovery priorities and critical services.
controls.platformRequirement: Link BIA records to critical functions, assets, RTO/RPO, suppliers and plans.

controls.title: ICT response and recovery plans
controls.objective: Develop and maintain response and recovery plans for ICT disruptions.
controls.platformRequirement: Store ICT DR and recovery plans linked to assets, systems and critical functions.

controls.title: Crisis management process
controls.objective: Define crisis management escalation, decision-making and coordination during major ICT disruption.
controls.platformRequirement: Add crisis workflow, war-room log and executive decision evidence.

controls.title: Backup policy
controls.objective: Maintain backup policies and procedures for ICT systems and data.
controls.platformRequirement: Track backup scope, frequency, retention, locations, ownership and exceptions.

controls.title: Backup restoration testing
controls.objective: Test restoration of backups and recovery procedures.
controls.platformRequirement: Schedule and evidence restoration tests with outcome, issues and remediation.

controls.title: Separated and resilient backup arrangements
controls.objective: Ensure backup arrangements reduce loss, corruption, unavailability and ransomware impact.
controls.platformRequirement: Track backup resilience features such as separation, encryption and immutability where applicable.

controls.title: Recovery time and recovery point objectives
controls.objective: Define and approve RTO/RPO for systems supporting critical or important functions.
controls.platformRequirement: Capture RTO/RPO per service/function and compare against test results.

controls.title: Disaster recovery testing
controls.objective: Test ICT response, recovery and restoration plans.
controls.platformRequirement: Schedule DR tests, record outcomes, map gaps to corrective actions.

controls.title: Crisis and incident communication plan
controls.objective: Maintain communication plans for ICT disruption affecting stakeholders, clients and authorities.
controls.platformRequirement: Add contact lists, templates, escalation rules and communication approvals.

controls.title: Alternative operating arrangements
controls.objective: Define fallback arrangements for critical services during ICT disruption.
controls.platformRequirement: Record manual procedures, alternate sites, redundant services and runbook evidence.

controls.title: Plan update after tests/incidents
controls.objective: Update continuity, backup and recovery plans based on incidents, tests and lessons learned.
controls.platformRequirement: Trigger plan review from incident closure or failed test records.

controls.title: Digital operational resilience testing programme
controls.objective: Develop, maintain and review a digital operational resilience testing programme.
controls.platformRequirement: Create testing programme module with test types, scope, schedule, evidence and findings.

controls.title: Annual testing of critical systems and applications
controls.objective: Test ICT systems and applications supporting critical or important functions at least annually.
controls.platformRequirement: Generate annual test calendar based on critical function mappings.

controls.title: Vulnerability assessments
controls.objective: Perform vulnerability assessments as part of resilience testing.
controls.platformRequirement: Ingest scan results and track remediation against critical assets.

controls.title: Penetration testing
controls.objective: Perform penetration tests of relevant ICT systems and applications based on risk.
controls.platformRequirement: Record penetration test scope, provider, findings and closure evidence.

controls.title: Scenario-based and tabletop exercises
controls.objective: Use scenario-based tests to validate resilience, response and coordination.
controls.platformRequirement: Maintain exercise scenarios, participants, outcomes and lessons learned.

controls.title: Performance and capacity testing
controls.objective: Test performance and capacity of systems supporting critical or important functions.
controls.platformRequirement: Capture performance test results and link gaps to resilience risks.

controls.title: End-to-end and compatibility testing
controls.objective: Validate end-to-end processing and compatibility across ICT systems and dependencies.
controls.platformRequirement: Track test coverage for critical processes, interfaces and third-party integrations.

controls.title: Testing findings remediation
controls.objective: Track and close findings identified through digital operational resilience testing.
controls.platformRequirement: Create remediation tasks, due dates, risk acceptance and retest evidence.

controls.title: Independence and competence of testers
controls.objective: Ensure testing is performed by competent and appropriately independent internal or external testers.
controls.platformRequirement: Track tester qualifications, independence declarations and provider due diligence.

controls.title: TLPT applicability assessment
controls.objective: Determine whether the financial entity is required by the competent/TLPT authority to perform TLPT.
controls.platformRequirement: Add TLPT selection field and applicability workflow based on authority decision, systemic importance and ICT risk profile.

controls.title: TLPT governance and authority coordination
controls.objective: Establish TLPT governance, test manager role and coordination with TLPT authorities.
controls.platformRequirement: Create TLPT project workflow with TCT/authority communications and approvals.

controls.title: TLPT scope over critical or important functions
controls.objective: Scope TLPT over several or all critical or important functions and live production systems supporting them.
controls.platformRequirement: Generate TLPT scope from critical function and system dependency map.

controls.title: Threat intelligence provider selection
controls.objective: Select competent threat intelligence providers for TLPT preparation.
controls.platformRequirement: Track provider due diligence, qualifications, independence and contract evidence.

controls.title: Red team provider requirements
controls.objective: Select and manage qualified red team testers for TLPT execution.
controls.platformRequirement: Track external/internal tester requirements, competence and independence evidence.

controls.title: TLPT risk management for live production testing
controls.objective: Manage operational and security risks arising from threat-led testing on live systems.
controls.platformRequirement: Add safety controls, stop criteria, escalation contacts and approval workflow.

controls.title: TLPT reports, closure and remediation
controls.objective: Document TLPT results, closure, attestation and remediation actions.
controls.platformRequirement: Store TLPT deliverables and connect findings to remediation and risk updates.

controls.title: TLPT three-year planning cycle
controls.objective: Maintain planning for TLPT at the frequency required for selected financial entities.
controls.platformRequirement: Add TLPT scheduling fields and reminders with authority validation where required.

controls.title: ICT third-party risk strategy
controls.objective: Adopt and regularly review a strategy on ICT third-party risk where applicable.
controls.platformRequirement: Create TPRM strategy record linked to multi-vendor strategy and concentration risk.

controls.title: Policy for ICT services supporting critical or important functions
controls.objective: Maintain a policy for contractual arrangements on ICT services supporting critical or important functions.
controls.platformRequirement: Enable policy lifecycle covering planning, approval, implementation, monitoring and termination.

controls.title: ICT service and critical function classification
controls.objective: Classify ICT services by whether they support critical or important functions.
controls.platformRequirement: Add service classification field and link to contracts, providers, RoI and risk assessment.

controls.title: Pre-contract due diligence
controls.objective: Assess ICT third-party service providers before entering contractual arrangements.
controls.platformRequirement: Create due diligence questionnaire with info security, resilience, financial, legal and concentration checks.

controls.title: Provider information security standards
controls.objective: Only enter arrangements with ICT third-party providers that meet appropriate information security standards.
controls.platformRequirement: Capture provider certifications, attestations, control reports and exceptions.

controls.title: ICT concentration risk assessment
controls.objective: Assess concentration risk for providers, critical services, subcontractors and geographic dependencies.
controls.platformRequirement: Add concentration dashboard by provider, service category, country, group and subcontractor.

controls.title: Risk assessment before CIF-supported ICT contracting
controls.objective: Assess risks before contracting ICT services supporting critical or important functions.
controls.platformRequirement: Add approval gate requiring risk assessment and management sign-off for CIF-supported services.

controls.title: DORA minimum contractual provisions
controls.objective: Ensure ICT third-party contracts include required DORA contractual provisions.
controls.platformRequirement: Add contract clause checklist and gap analysis for each ICT provider contract.

controls.title: Access, audit and inspection rights
controls.objective: Include and exercise access, audit and inspection rights over ICT third-party providers as required.
controls.platformRequirement: Track audit rights, audit calendar, reports and provider cooperation.

controls.title: Service levels and provider monitoring
controls.objective: Define and monitor service levels, performance and resilience requirements in ICT contracts.
controls.platformRequirement: Add SLA/KPI monitoring and link breaches to supplier risk and incident workflow.

controls.title: Provider incident notification obligations
controls.objective: Ensure providers notify the financial entity of ICT incidents affecting services.
controls.platformRequirement: Track contract notification clauses and vendor incident integration workflow.

controls.title: Data location, protection, return and deletion clauses
controls.objective: Address data protection, location, access, return and deletion in ICT third-party contracts.
controls.platformRequirement: Capture data location, processing, return/deletion and exit requirements per contract.

controls.title: Exit strategy for critical or important ICT services
controls.objective: Maintain exit strategies for ICT services supporting critical or important functions.
controls.platformRequirement: Add exit plan, triggers, alternative provider options and exit test evidence.

controls.title: Termination rights
controls.objective: Ensure contracts include termination rights for material circumstances and supervisory concerns.
controls.platformRequirement: Add clause mapping and renewal/termination decision workflow.

controls.title: Ongoing provider risk monitoring
controls.objective: Continuously monitor ICT third-party risk throughout the contract lifecycle.
controls.platformRequirement: Maintain vendor risk score, due diligence renewals, SLA performance, incidents and findings.

controls.title: Material provider/contract changes
controls.objective: Assess material changes affecting ICT third-party services or provider risk.
controls.platformRequirement: Trigger risk reassessment and approvals from contract/service change records.

controls.title: Subcontracting chain identification
controls.objective: Identify and assess subcontractors supporting ICT services for critical or important functions.
controls.platformRequirement: Capture subcontractor chain, location, service, materiality and risk details.

controls.title: Subcontractor material change notification
controls.objective: Ensure providers notify material changes to subcontracting arrangements in time for assessment.
controls.platformRequirement: Track subcontractor change notifications and require impact/risk review.

controls.title: Provider assurance and audits
controls.objective: Obtain and review assurance over providers supporting critical or important functions.
controls.platformRequirement: Track audit reports, SOC/ISO evidence, onsite assessments and remediation follow-up.

controls.title: Intragroup ICT service oversight
controls.objective: Manage intragroup ICT service providers with equivalent risk management and documentation discipline.
controls.platformRequirement: Allow providers to be internal group entities and apply DORA TPRM controls proportionately.

controls.title: Cloud and hosting resilience controls
controls.objective: Assess cloud/hosting arrangements for concentration, exit, data location, resilience and subcontracting risk.
controls.platformRequirement: Add cloud-specific due diligence fields and concentration dashboard.

controls.title: Exit testing for critical third-party ICT services
controls.objective: Test exit or transition arrangements for critical/important ICT third-party services where feasible.
controls.platformRequirement: Schedule exit test or tabletop and record issues, dependencies and corrective actions.

controls.title: Register of Information for ICT third-party contracts
controls.objective: Maintain and update a register of information for all contractual arrangements with ICT third-party service providers.
controls.platformRequirement: Create RoI module linked to supplier, contract, service, function, data and subcontractor records.

controls.title: Entity, sub-consolidated and consolidated RoI levels
controls.objective: Maintain RoI at entity level and, where relevant, sub-consolidated/consolidated levels.
controls.platformRequirement: Support entity hierarchy and roll-up reporting for RoI submissions.

controls.title: RoI template alignment
controls.objective: Align RoI content, structure and format to the EU standard templates.
controls.platformRequirement: Implement data fields, validation rules and export aligned to Implementing Regulation 2024/2956.

controls.title: RoI ownership and update process
controls.objective: Define ownership and procedures for maintaining complete and accurate RoI data.
controls.platformRequirement: Assign field-level owners, update triggers, completeness checks and approvals.

controls.title: RoI supervisory submission readiness
controls.objective: Ensure RoI can be submitted to competent authorities annually or upon request.
controls.platformRequirement: Create export, validation and submission workflow with evidence of submission.

controls.title: RoI data validation and completeness
controls.objective: Validate RoI data completeness, consistency and format before submission.
controls.platformRequirement: Implement validation rules for mandatory fields, duplicate relationships and invalid values.

controls.title: RoI linkage to critical/important functions
controls.objective: Link RoI records to the critical or important functions supported by each ICT service.
controls.platformRequirement: Require function mapping for all critical/important service records.

controls.title: RoI subcontractor chain data
controls.objective: Capture subcontractor chain data required for ICT services and material subcontracting arrangements.
controls.platformRequirement: Link subcontractors to provider, service, function, country and data location records.

controls.title: Information-sharing arrangement policy
controls.objective: Where the entity participates in cyber threat information-sharing arrangements, ensure they support resilience and comply with confidentiality and competition requirements.
controls.platformRequirement: Enable optional information-sharing register with participants, scope, rules and approvals.

controls.title: Confidentiality and legal safeguards
controls.objective: Maintain safeguards for sharing cyber threat information, including confidentiality, data protection and business secrecy.
controls.platformRequirement: Add legal review and confidentiality controls for shared indicators/intelligence.

controls.title: Threat intelligence use from sharing arrangements
controls.objective: Use relevant shared threat intelligence to update monitoring, controls, risk assessments and incident readiness.
controls.platformRequirement: Link shared intelligence items to risks, detection rules, controls and incidents.

controls.title: Simplified framework eligibility determination
controls.objective: Determine whether the entity falls under the simplified ICT risk management framework.
controls.platformRequirement: Add onboarding question and legal eligibility evidence for Article 16 profile.

controls.title: Simplified governance and organisation
controls.objective: Maintain governance and control arrangements for effective ICT risk management under the simplified framework.
controls.platformRequirement: Enable simplified governance controls and evidence requirements.

controls.title: Simplified information security policy
controls.objective: Develop and implement an information security policy protecting confidentiality, integrity, availability and authenticity.
controls.platformRequirement: Load simplified policy evidence fields and core control mapping.

controls.title: Simplified classification of functions and assets
controls.objective: Identify, classify and document critical or important functions, information assets, ICT assets and dependencies.
controls.platformRequirement: Enable simplified asset/function inventory with third-party dependencies.

controls.title: Simplified ICT risk management process
controls.objective: Determine ICT risk tolerance, identify/assess ICT risks, define mitigation and monitor effectiveness.
controls.platformRequirement: Use simplified risk register with tolerance, risk assessment and mitigation fields.

controls.title: Simplified threat, vulnerability and alert thresholds
controls.objective: Monitor threats/vulnerabilities and set alert thresholds for incident response.
controls.platformRequirement: Add simplified threat/vulnerability review and incident trigger rules.

controls.title: Simplified physical and environmental security
controls.objective: Implement physical and environmental security measures proportionate to risk and asset criticality.
controls.platformRequirement: Enable core facilities/data centre evidence collection.

controls.title: Simplified access control
controls.objective: Develop and maintain access control measures for users, administrators and systems.
controls.platformRequirement: Load simplified IAM controls for provisioning, MFA, privileged access and review.

controls.title: Simplified ICT operations security
controls.objective: Maintain ICT operations security controls to minimise ICT risk impact.
controls.platformRequirement: Track core operational security runbooks, monitoring and capacity controls.

controls.title: Simplified data, system and network security
controls.objective: Protect data, systems and networks through proportionate technical controls.
controls.platformRequirement: Enable simplified evidence for network, endpoint, encryption and data security controls.

controls.title: Simplified ICT security testing
controls.objective: Perform ICT security testing proportionate to the ICT risk profile.
controls.platformRequirement: Schedule simplified testing activities and track findings/remediation.

controls.title: Simplified acquisition, development and maintenance
controls.objective: Apply security controls to ICT system acquisition, development and maintenance.
controls.platformRequirement: Track simplified secure change, procurement and development evidence.

controls.title: Simplified ICT project and change management
controls.objective: Manage ICT projects and changes with appropriate risk and security assessment.
controls.platformRequirement: Enable simplified project/change risk gate and approval evidence.

controls.title: Simplified business continuity planning
controls.objective: Maintain ICT business continuity plans and test them proportionately.
controls.platformRequirement: Enable simplified BCP plan, test schedule and remediation tracking.

controls.title: Simplified RMF review report
controls.objective: Review the simplified ICT risk management framework and document outcomes.
controls.platformRequirement: Generate a simplified RMF review report with gaps, remediation and approvals.

controls.title: ICT provider DORA customer contract readiness
controls.objective: For ICT service providers serving DORA financial entities, maintain contract and assurance readiness for customer DORA obligations.
controls.platformRequirement: Enable provider-side profile with customer evidence pack, DORA clause support and incident notification capability.

controls.title: Critical ICT third-party provider designation monitoring
controls.objective: For ICT third-party providers, monitor whether they are designated as critical ICT third-party service providers.
controls.platformRequirement: Add CTPP designation status and oversight obligations tracker.

controls.title: Lead overseer cooperation readiness
controls.objective: If designated critical, support oversight requests, inspections and information submissions.
controls.platformRequirement: Create oversight request register and evidence workflow for CTPP profile.
